info.title: IMMZD18SCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

ValueSet-IMMZD18SCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Dos.title: IMMZD18SCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD18SCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Dos.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Primary series for cholera has been completed and latest cholera dose was administered approximately less than 2 years ago-284
Booster dose was administered approximately less than 2 years ago-175

ValueSet-IMMZD18SCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Dos.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD18SCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD18SCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
